channel.title: node on T++
channel.description: Recent content in node on T++

item.title: Setting up SSH Git deploy with Webfaction
item.description: I spent about three days trying to get this to work with an https server, but eventually gave in. There were too many issues related to the account the hook would run under for my limited linux experience to solve. So the SSH method will have to do for now. Setting up Git If you follow this guide through the Creating a new repository section, you should be good. For the sake of history, here are the installation steps from it
